name: smartphysics-kz
description: SmartPhysics KZ — interactive physics learning platform for 7th grade (Kazakhstan)

scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,client -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev -w server" "npm run dev -w client"
scripts.build: npm run build -w server && npm run build -w client
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w server && npm run lint -w client
